sections.paragraph:
Original: דּיני

Transliteration: dı̂ynay

Phonetic: dee-nah'ee

BDB Definition:

Dinaites = "judgment"
  1. the name of some of the Cuthaean colonists who were placed in the cities of Samaria after the captivity of the ten tribes

Origin: patrial from an uncertain primitive

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
